revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-2-020

A letter or group of letters in morse code or some other combination of dots or dashes or both introduced into the transmission to identify the beacon. In some cases two tones are employed.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Identification signal}}
